🔮 Oceanus Folk Superstar Predictor

🏆 Predicted Superstars (Weighted Score)

    Adjust weights. Factors are taken directly from your JSON’s Oceanus Folk genre entry.
    Note: “Oceanus Growth Rate” is the average yearly change in number of Oceanus Folk works (positive only).
    “Overall Growth Rate” is the average yearly change in total works of any genre.
